actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Luton Town have signed Newcastle United goalkeeper Jak Alnwick on loan until the end of the season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Plans for a distillery near Jedburgh have been given the go-ahead.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police in Avon and Somerset have arrested eight people after officers were injured at a rave in Avonside Industrial Estate.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died after a car collided with a van in Bloxwich.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 22-year-old woman has died after falling from a bridge in Wandsworth.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Chelsea's Ola Aina has joined Championship side Brighton & Hove Albion on loan until the end of the season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Poole Park has received a Â£1.5m grant for improvements.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Roma's Mohamed Salah has been ruled out of Egypt's Nations Cup campaign after tests revealed he has injured his ligament.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Four people have been taken to hospital after an incident in Peterborough city centre.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police in Melbourne have arrested a man after carrying out a counter-terrorism operation in Greenvale.
